sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n81232" key="peri/deilos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">περίδειλος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ος</itype>, <sense id="n81232.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">very cowardly</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg9009.tlg001:15:32" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Apostol.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">15.32</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
